categories.idea: App improvements, feature requests, project ideas
categories.read: Articles, books, resources, links to check out
categories.write: Blog posts, content to create, docs to draft
categories.share: Things to send or forward to someone

auto_high: Deadlines — anything with an explicit date or time pressure
Work obligations — meetings, deliverables, boss requests
low_trigger: Only if Elli says 'no rush' or 'someday'
ask_when: Genuinely ambiguous — could be casual or critical
